title: docs(sprints): close CI-RED-015-L — IBG sandbox landmark intake bridge
intent: SPRINTS.md ledger-only update: add a CLOSED row for the CI-RED-015-L sub-bucket only. 015-L is the additive IBG sandbox landmark candidate intake bridge (dev-ready scope, not a failing-test cluster), shipped and merged as #178 (869384c2). Documentation only; no product/application/CI-behavior change; this PR records the status of the already-merged implementation and does not itself enforce adapter behavior. Uses the per-PR manifest convention documented in .cbsp21/patches/README.md (#184).

diff_articulation.what_changed: SPRINTS.md: insert one row into the CI-RED-015 bucket table (between 015-H and the 015-F umbrella tail) recording 015-L as CLOSED by #178 (869384c2). The row now explicitly scopes the closure to the 015-L sub-bucket, not the broader CI-RED-015 umbrella, and identifies #178's implementation files/tests as the behavioral source of truth. The row documents the #178-witnessed behavior: sandbox landmark candidate records are imported as review-required, fail-closed BodyEvidenceCandidates (evidence geometry, not authority: no mm calibration, no solver landmarks, no IBG-memory, no export authority); the default intake gate rejects them (AUTHORITY_INSUFFICIENT + REVIEW_REQUIRED); and in-PR review hardening landed in ba16d594 (authority_state->geometry_authority_class metadata rename, namespaced sandbox review flag, semantic validation). CI-RED-015 top-line status is unchanged (stays OPEN; other buckets remain open).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: This ledger row prevents stale-open tracking for a merged sub-bucket while also preventing false umbrella closure: it says where the real implementation/test witness lives, and it says this docs PR is not a behavior-enforcement change.

Markdown table integrity: new 015-L row keeps 4 columns / 5 pipes, matching sibling bucket rows.

files.intent: Add CLOSED row for the CI-RED-015-L sub-bucket (IBG sandbox landmark intake bridge) to the CI-RED-015 bucket table, citing #178 as the implementation/test source of truth while leaving the broader CI-RED-015 umbrella open.
